creator: johannes.kunde@gmail.com
text:
When building devel/rubygem-json_schemer from source, make throws the following error:
Missing license file for MIT in /usr/ports/devel/rubygem-json_schemer/work/json_schemer-0.2.13/LICENSE.md

The license file in the given directory is of the format *.txt instead of *.md, and therefore make states it as missing.
